description: If you want to make a style statement effortlessly, this black handbag from fastrack will come in handy! Look trendy and chic as you pair it with your casual outfits when you go to the mall or to college. And don't you be deceived by its compact look, for there's ample space to hold all your essentials! Height: 17 cm Width: 29 cm Depth at base: 5 cm Made of nylon for durability and comfort One large zippered compartment with an inner zippered compartment to stash away essentials One zippered roomy compartment at the back Single adjustable strap to hang the bag from the shoulder One small pocket on the front with a flap and a press buttoned closure One big pocket on the front with a magnetic buttoned closure Branded zippers and sliders for easy use Nylon bonded thread for long life Brand name appliqué d on the front Brand tab appliqué d on the side Care Do not machine wash Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
